title: Verilator thinks code contains delayed assignment for large arrays

features.name: non-blocking assignment to unpacked array inside large for loop
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment to an unpacked array element inside a for loop with 65 or more iterations
features.snippet:
reg [7:0] state[256];
always @(posedge clk) for (int i=0; i<256; i++) state[i] <= 8'h0;
